title: OpenRouter Relay
description: The coast learned to send zero-memory messages through the relay room.

title: App Porch
description: The first visible browser entrance opened at the coast.

title: Release Tools
description: Snapshot and fixed Git HEAD release export tools were added.

title: Starsea Black Gold
description: The App Porch gained its deep blue gold starsea visual identity.

title: Room Doors
description: The porch gained clickable room doors and static room pages.

title: Memory Coast First Shelf
description: The first visible memory shelf opened inside Memory Coast.

title: Archive Room First Shelf
description: The archive gained its first shelf for releases, blueprints, safety ropes, and first echoes.

title: App Core
description: A separate frontend shell begins the migration toward a real app structure.
